productDisplayName: Rockport Men Slatkin Grey Casual Shoes
description: Designed for the man who never compromises on style and comfort, this Slatkin active casual shoe from rockport makes for a great addition to your wardrobe. UpperMesh upper for breathable comfort, with startegically placed suede overlays for absolute style and enhanced shoe structureLacing system for a snug, customised FitadiPRENE inserts in the footbed for a custom fit and impact protectionRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticPadded collar and tongue with a fabric inner for a snug, customised fitPull loop at the tongue and collar for easy on/off and to hang shoes from a backpackMidsolePhylon midsole for all day comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with waffle pattern lugs on the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves for easy movementCurved midfoot for ergonomic comfortImpact guidance line to evenly distribute shock and enhance energy returnShoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to clean the overlaysDo not store in direct sunlight
